action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of best.pt + best_v2.pt gave 80.18%, worse than best.pt alone (80.32%). The second model was poorly trained (val_acc=0.598) and is hurting predictions. Time remaining: ~10 min. Analysis: Need to remove ensembling and just use best.pt with TTA. Decision: Update predict.py to remove ensembling, submit eval with best.pt.
